name: ai-stock-intelligence
description: Agent Skills converted from xbtlin/ai-berkshire for value-investing research, earnings review, industry work, portfolio review, and investment writing.

skills.name: bottleneck-hunter
skills.description: Finds investable public companies created by second- and third-order supply-chain bottlenecks behind major physical supertrends.

skills.name: deep-company-series
skills.description: Builds a serialized deep-company research plan and article/report sequence for a public or private company.

skills.name: dyp-ask
skills.description: Analyzes a company through Duan Yongping-style product truth, customer value, pricing restraint, and long-term compounding questions.

skills.name: earnings-review
skills.description: Reviews a company earnings release or filing with value-investing discipline, data verification, deltas, and thesis-impact judgment.

skills.name: earnings-team
skills.description: Runs a multi-agent earnings-review team workflow that assigns specialist reviewers and synthesizes their findings.

skills.name: financial-data
skills.description: Collects, audits, reconciles, and structures financial data for public-company research workflows.

skills.name: industry-funnel
skills.description: Funnels an industry from broad universe to high-quality investable candidates using moat, economics, and valuation filters.

skills.name: industry-research
skills.description: Performs industry-level research, structure mapping, value-chain analysis, competitive dynamics, and investable-company identification.

skills.name: investment-checklist
skills.description: Applies a disciplined value-investing checklist to a company, including business quality, management, risk, and valuation gates.

skills.name: investment-research
skills.description: Produces a full value-investing research report for a company using Buffett, Munger, Duan Yongping, and Li Lu perspectives.

skills.name: investment-team
skills.description: Runs the multi-agent value-investing team dialectic and synthesizes specialist investor-persona conclusions.

skills.name: management-deep-dive
skills.description: Researches management quality, incentives, capital allocation, culture, governance, and evidence of owner-orientation.

skills.name: news-pulse
skills.description: Scans recent company, industry, and macro news for signal versus noise and investment-thesis impact.

skills.name: portfolio-review
skills.description: Reviews a portfolio through position sizing, thesis drift, risk concentration, valuation, and opportunity-cost lenses.

skills.name: private-company-research
skills.description: Researches a private company using available public sources, industry context, business model analysis, and risk checks.

skills.name: quality-screen
skills.description: Screens companies for high-quality business characteristics, durability, returns on capital, and reinvestment runway.

skills.name: thesis-tracker
skills.description: Tracks an investment thesis over time with milestones, disconfirming evidence, kill criteria, and review cadence.

skills.name: wechat-article
skills.description: Converts investment research into a structured long-form WeChat-style article while preserving evidence and nuance.
